title: Build Signal Run v0 playable wedge
objective: Create the smallest tangible Roblox playable that proves the round/reward/retention telemetry loop.
game_pitch: A short corrupted-signal corridor runner where players collect SignalFragments, reach a relay gate, claim a reward, and immediately choose to run again.
must_build: Telemetry event emission for the full loop
Deterministic local/test harness that emits one aggregate snapshot
acceptance_criteria: A local player can start a round from a start trigger
A local player can complete the run through a finish trigger
The server grants a structured reward payload
The client displays a placeholder reward panel
The player can claim the reward
The player can choose Run Again
The ordered event loop is emitted once end-to-end
A deterministic aggregate telemetry snapshot can be generated without raw player IDs
claude_relay: Build the smallest Roblox playable, not another architecture cathedral. Wire the existing telemetry and reward seams into Signal Run. The proof is one local round that completes, grants, claims, and starts again. If tempted to add lore, shop, cosmetics, procedural gen, or monetization, stop. Ship the loop.
